name: Crusoe Energy
pricing_notes: H100 SXM5 80GB ~$2.50/hr; A100 80GB ~$1.80/hr; compute prices 30-50% below hyperscalers

auth.notes: API key from Crusoe Cloud dashboard; Bearer token auth

performance.notes: VM provisioning 1-3 min; network performance good; H100 cluster connectivity fast

agent_readiness.notes: GPU cloud provider differentiating on sustainability (powered by flared/stranded gas monetization). H100/A100 clusters. REST API for instance management. Kubernetes support. Better reliability than consumer GPU clouds. Sustainability angle attractive to ESG-conscious enterprises. Used by AI labs for large training runs.

gotchas: Availability primarily US-West; limited geographic coverage
API less feature-rich than AWS EC2 (fewer networking options)
Sustainability story is marketing — environmental impact is complex
best_when: ESG-conscious enterprises wanting sustainable GPU compute
Large-scale LLM pre-training runs needing H100 clusters at reasonable cost
AI labs seeking H100 SXM5 without AWS/Azure commitment
Long-term compute contracts where sustainability reporting matters
avoid_when: Short-term spot GPU needs (RunPod/Vast.ai more flexible)
summary: Crusoe Energy provides GPU cloud compute (H100/A100 clusters) differentiated by a sustainability angle — powered by flared natural gas monetization. 30-50% cheaper than AWS/GCP for equivalent GPU compute. REST API for instance management with Kubernetes support. Better reliability than consumer GPU clouds. Best for ESG-conscious enterprises or AI labs needing large H100 clusters for pre-training runs.
